sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No. 310 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.1854/2025 (stay) 2. For hearing of Main Case 26.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Waleed, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not wish to press this Reference Application, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ashraf
